markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between StackBlitz and GrowthX for content strategy and growth acceleration.](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [StackBlitz is interested in partnering with GrowthX to rapidly expand their content and traffic, aiming to outpace competitors like Replit](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed a two-pronged approach: template pages for long-tail keywords and potential fully-functional starter kits](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [StackBlitz has valuable prompt data that can be leveraged for content strategy and categorization](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Both parties are eager to move quickly, with a goal to have initial pages live by end of March](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

## Topics

### Current StackBlitz Priorities

  - [Eric (StackBlitz CEO) is focused on paid ads](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Limited bandwidth for content creation internally](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Desire to outsource growth efforts to an agency](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Strategy

  - [Create template pages for long-tail keywords and app categories](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Develop starter kits and showcase apps for users to fork](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Leverage StackBlitz's existing prompt data for content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Use AI and clustering to categorize and process user prompts](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Scale rapidly to increase indexable pages (currently \~60) to thousands](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### Data and Technical Collaboration

  - [StackBlitz can provide a dump of \~10,000 initial prompts for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [GrowthX has clustering capabilities to identify trends and categories](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [StackBlitz offers an API to trigger builds from prompts](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Potential to integrate template pages into StackBlitz's user registration flow](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)

### Partnership Benefits

  - [GrowthX aims to act as StackBlitz's "growth team as a service"](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Focus on speed and aggressive growth to outpace competitors](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Potential for case studies and public success stories](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Accelerate time-to-value for StackBlitz users with targeted templates](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [StackBlitz wants to surpass Replit in traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Current competition on unique users and ARR, but not on page views](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Opportunity to create network effects and leverage proprietary data](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mitchell to discuss partnership details with Eric (StackBlitz CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a comprehensive strategy and proposal early next week](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to align on the proposal and initiate the project](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Aim to have initial pages live by the end of March](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Explore potential for case study and public partnership announcement post-success](https://fathom.video/share/PW9kL_d5J78t2JRyJT2rL2dtHVHTGnEP?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
